emails.subject: RE: Wasatch Quote
emails.body: RE: Wasatch Quote Dec-Mar02 Fixed Float Swap at Sumas is offered US$4.52/MMbtu May-Nov02 Fixed Float Swap at Sumas is offered US$3.31/MMbtu These offers are based on the volumes you sent to me. I hope these work! Regards, Jon To: Quigley, Dutch; Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: FW: Wasatch Quote
emails.body: FW: Wasatch Quote I need to refresh this quote: John, this time, can I just have the Sumas piece instead of the all in price? Volumes are on the attachment. John: Sumas Offer please. Dec-Mar02 and then May02-Nov02. Dutch: Nymex piece. I attached the numbers this time. Again, I'm looking for your offer for a fixed price, Northwest Pipeline sumas index swap Thanks Enron sheet.xls

emails.subject: RE: Wasatch Quote
emails.body: RE: Wasatch Quote Dec-Mar offer NX1 87 May-Nov offer NX! -.23 What you don't like my NYMEX offer? Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan; Quigley, Dutch
